metadata.name: SuperTeam
metadata.description: Seven-stage delivery plugin with main-session-as-orchestrator architecture and hook-enforced trust chain

plugins.name: superteam
plugins.description: V4.7.9 anti-dump self-stop guard + ≥4 threshold loop valve · 修 V4.7.7 stop_hook_active 1-strike 漏洞 (实测漏洞放行率 79%)。改造: (1) is_project_alive() 单 bit accessor; (2) paused 也 BLOCK 仅 ended 是合法退出; (3) 5 要素强引导 reason (标识/硬约束/禁止/读 plan 推进/唯一退出); (4) ≥4 阈值 valve 取代 1-strike 放行, 前 3 次给 OR 修正机会, 第 4 次方触发 case-3 救命阀, 比 60s timeout 更确定不受网络/IO 干扰; (5) fail-closed 双层 try/except; (6) AST purity test BANNED project_lifecycle 字符串防多值比较回潮; (7) mode_state stop_block_count API。承袭 V4.7.8 plugin.json 修复, V4.7.6 兼容层, V4.7.5 状态机文件 BLOCK 列表。25 cases + 5-round end-to-end demo + real LLM behavior test 全绿。
